text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 Iranian delegation will be in Islamabad for talks tonight — Iran's ambassador to Pakistan Reza Amiri Moghadam “Despite skepticism of Iranian public opinion due to repeated ceasefire violations by Israeli regime”
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 伊朗代表团将于今晚在伊斯兰堡进行会谈——伊朗驻巴基斯坦大使礼萨·阿米里·穆加达姆表示：“尽管由于以色列政权屡次违反停火协议，伊朗公众舆论持怀疑态度”

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 BBC: Iranian Deputy Foreign Minister Saeed Khatibzadeh says that the U.S. must choose a ceasefire or allowing Israeli strikes on Lebanon to continue. "US cannot have its cake & eat it. Trump must choose between a ceasefire & allowing its ally Israel to continue the war in Lebanon." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 BBC：伊朗副外长赛义德·哈提卜扎德表示，美国必须选择停火或允许以色列继续打击黎巴嫩。“美国不能两全其美。特朗普必须在停火与允许其盟友以色列继续在黎巴嫩的战争之间做出选择。”@wfwitness

text: Sen. John Fetterman: Every single thing Iran done and is is an entire war crime.
text_zh: 参议员约翰·费特曼：伊朗所做和正在做的每一件事都是彻头彻尾的战争罪行。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 The IDF has released new footage of paratroopers under the 98th Division in southern Lebanon as Israeli continues cross border operations continue. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列国防军发布了第98师伞兵在黎巴嫩南部的新画面，以色列的跨境行动仍在继续。@wfwitness

text: The White House reviewed and approved the social media post by Pakistan’s prime minister, Shehbaz Sharif, before he published it urging Trump to extend a deadline with Iran. Source: NYT
text_zh: 白宫在巴基斯坦总理谢赫巴兹·谢里夫发布敦促特朗普延长与伊朗的最后期限的社交媒体帖子前，对其进行了审查并批准。来源：纽约时报

text: Q: Is the world safer today than it was before the war was started? Mark Rutte: Absolutely — and this is thanks to Trump's leadership.
text_zh: 问：世界现在比战争开始前更安全吗？马克·吕特：绝对如此——这要归功于特朗普的领导力。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Bloomberg: The U.S. is pressing NATO allies to provide concrete plans within days to help secure the Strait of Hormuz once fighting with Iran subsides. The request was raised during meetings in Washington between U.S. President Trump and NATO Secretary-General Rutte, as well as in discussions at the Pentagon and State Department. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 彭博社：美国正敦促北约盟友在数日内提供具体计划，以在伊朗战事平息后协助确保霍尔木兹海峡安全。此要求是在华盛顿举行的美国总统特朗普与北约秘书长吕特会晤期间，以及五角大楼和国务院的讨论中提出的。@wfwitness

text: The U.S. is pushing its allies to move quickly on securing the Strait of Hormuz after the ceasefire, asking European countries to present concrete plans within days. Source: Bloomberg
text_zh: 美国正推动盟友在停火后迅速行动以确保霍尔木兹海峡安全，要求欧洲国家在数日内提出具体计划。来源：彭博社

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Rybar in English: Fwd from @ #Summary for the morning of April 9, 2026 ▪️ In Krasnodar Region, a man was killed in Sauk-Dere, UAVs crashed in Mekkertsuk and damaged a house in Slavyansk-na-Kubani. Enemy claims the target was a pipeline facility. Zelensky mentioned a ceasefire. UAVs were destroyed in Rostov Region. ▪️ Russian forces struck merchant vessels in Izmail, Odesa Region. Explosions occurred in Odesa, Pavlograd, Sumy and Kharkiv regions. ▪️ In Bryansk Region, the AFU attacked Demyanki, wounding a Bryanskenergo employee. A civilian was wounded in Novy Ropsk. ▪️ In Sumy, Grouping North achieved tactical successes, capturing an AFU soldier. ▪️ In Belgorod Region, civilians were wounded by drone strikes in Grayvoron, Shebekino and Belgorod. ▪️ In Kharkiv, Russian forces are advancing with heavy fighting in the Volchansk direction. ▪️ In Kupiansk, Russian forces are achieving success south of Pischane. ▪️ In Slavyansk, the AFU is counterattacking in Lipovka, while Russian forces are advancing south of Kaleniki. ▪️ In Dobropolsk, fighting continues in Novoaleksandrivka and Vasylivka. ▪️ In Dnipropetrovsk, the AFU's 82nd Brigade counterattacked but lost an APC. ▪️ In Zaporizhia, Grouping East is penetrating the enemy defense to free settlements. ▪️ On the Zaporizhia front, fighting continues in Primorsk and Stepnohirsk. ▪️ In Kherson, civilians were wounded, and Russian forces are striking with FAB-3000 and thermobaric munitions. Summary compiled by: Two Majors Original msg
text_zh: 🔄 转自Rybar英文频道：转发自@ #2026年4月9日上午简报 ▪️ 在克拉斯诺达尔地区，索克-杰雷有一名男子死亡，无人机在梅克尔楚克坠毁，并在斯拉维扬斯克-纳-库巴尼损坏了一所房屋。敌方声称目标是管道设施。泽连斯基提到了停火。罗斯托夫地区有无人机被摧毁。▪️ 俄军袭击了敖德萨州伊兹梅尔的商船。敖德萨、巴甫洛格勒、苏梅和哈尔科夫地区发生爆炸。▪️ 在布良斯克地区，乌克兰武装部队袭击了杰米扬基，造成一名布良斯克能源公司员工受伤。新罗普斯克有一名平民受伤。▪️ 在苏梅方向，北方集团取得战术成功，俘获一名乌军士兵。▪️ 在别尔哥罗德地区，格拉伊沃隆、舍别基诺和别尔哥罗德的平民因无人机袭击受伤。▪️ 在哈尔科夫方向，俄军正在沃尔昌斯克方向激烈战斗中推进。▪️ 在库皮扬斯克方向，俄军在皮夏涅以南取得进展。▪️ 在斯拉维扬斯克方向，乌军在利波夫卡进行反击，而俄军则在卡列尼基以南推进。▪️ 在多布罗波尔斯基方向，新亚历山德里夫卡和瓦西里夫卡的战斗仍在继续。▪️ 在第聂伯罗彼得罗夫斯克方向，乌军第82旅进行反击但损失了一辆装甲运兵车。▪️ 在扎波罗热方向，东方集团正突破敌军防御以解放定居点。▪️ 在扎波罗热前线，普里莫尔斯克和斯捷波诺希尔斯的战斗仍在继续。▪️ 在赫尔松方向，平民受伤，俄军正使用FAB-3000和温压弹药进行打击。简报汇编：两位少校 原始消息

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Begging season at the White House: Trump demands NATO plans for Strait he couldn't secure alone
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 白宫乞求季：特朗普要求北约制定他独自无法确保的海峡计划

text: 🇮🇷 💬 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 An Iranian delegation will arrive in Islamabad this evening for talks with the US , Iranian Ambassador to Pakistan Reza Amiri Moghadam reported. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 💬 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 伊朗驻巴基斯坦大使礼萨·阿米里·穆加达姆报告，伊朗代表团将于今晚抵达伊斯兰堡与美国进行会谈。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: The Strait of Hormuz may be included in the U.S.–Iran cease-fire, but in practice it’s still barely functioning. No oil or gas tankers have passed through since the agreement, and only a handful of cargo ships have crossed. Even where passage might be possible, most shipping companies remain cautious and are avoiding the route. Source: NYT
text_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡可能被纳入美伊停火协议，但实际上仍几乎无法通行。自协议以来，没有油轮或天然气运输船通过，仅少数货船穿越。即使在可能通行的区域，大多数航运公司仍保持谨慎并避开该航线。来源：纽约时报

text: Iran plans to charge oil tankers cryptocurrency fees to pass through the Strait of Hormuz during the two-week ceasefire, while inspecting ships for weapons. Authorities say vessels must request permission, disclose cargo, and quickly pay about $1 per barrel in crypto. Ships that don’t comply risk being targeted. Source: FT
text_zh: 伊朗计划在为期两周的停火期间，对通过霍尔木兹海峡的油轮收取加密货币费用，同时检查船只是否携带武器。当局表示，船舶必须申请许可、申报货物，并快速支付每桶约1美元的加密费用。不遵守规定的船只可能成为攻击目标。来源：FT

text: Trump: The Failing New York Times and Fake News CNN each reported a totally FAKE TEN POINT PLAN on the Iran negotiations which was meant to discredit the people involved in the peace process. All ten points were a made up HOAX - EVIL LOSERS!!!
text_zh: 特朗普：《失败纽约时报》和假新闻CNN各自报道了一份完全虚假的关于伊朗谈判的十点计划，旨在抹黑参与和平进程的人士。这十点全是捏造的骗局——邪恶的失败者！！！

text: Trump: All U.S. Ships, Aircraft, and Military Personnel, with additional Ammunition, Weaponry, and anything else that is appropriate and necessary for the lethal prosecution and destruction of an already substantially degraded Enemy, will remain in place in, and around, Iran, until such time as the REAL AGREEMENT reached is fully complied with. If for any reason it is not, which is highly unlikely, then the “Shootin’ Starts,” bigger, and better, and stronger than anyone has ever seen before. It was agreed, a long time ago, and despite all of the fake rhetoric to the contrary - NO NUCLEAR WEAPONS and, the Strait of Hormuz WILL BE OPEN & SAFE. In the meantime our great Military is Loading Up and Resting, looking forward, actually, to its next Conquest. AMERICA IS BACK!
text_zh: 特朗普：所有美国船只、飞机和军事人员，连同额外的弹药、武器，以及任何其他适合且必要用于致命性打击和摧毁已大幅削弱的敌人的物资，将留在伊朗境内及周边，直至真正达成的协议得到完全遵守。若因任何原因未能实现（这极不可能），则“射击开始”，其规模、力度和强度将前所未有。很久以前就已达成一致，尽管有各种虚假言论相反——禁止核武器，且霍尔木兹海峡将保持开放与安全。与此同时，我们伟大的军队正在整装待发并休整，实际上，正期待着下一次征服。美国回来了！

text: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 Reuters : British Foreign Secretary Yvette Cooper is expected to call for shipping through the Strait of Hormuz must remain toll-free, rejecting Iran’s plan to charge fees, during her foreign policy speech at Mansion House. She will stress that freedom of navigation cannot be unilaterally withdrawn or sold and must remain open to all. Cooper is also expected to call for Lebanon to be included in the U.S.-Iran two-week ceasefire. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 路透社：英国外交大臣伊薇特·库珀预计将在其官邸外交政策演讲中呼吁霍尔木兹海峡航运必须保持免收费，拒绝伊朗的收费计划。她将强调航行自由不能被单方面取消或出售，必须对所有国家开放。库珀还预计将呼吁将黎巴嫩纳入美伊两周停火协议。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: U.S. officials report that gridlock over reopening the Strait of Hormuz could lead to hostilities reigniting. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 华尔街日报：美国官员报告称，关于重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的僵局可能导致敌对行动重燃。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Islamabad's Serena Hotel has been requsitioned by the Pakistani government until Sunday evening. This is likely the venue for negotiations between the U.S. and Iran this weekend. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 伊斯兰堡的塞雷纳酒店已被巴基斯坦政府征用至周日晚。这很可能是本周末美伊谈判的地点。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 Iranian Ambassador to Pakistan says the Iranian delegation will arrive in Islamabad tonight for “serious talks” based on the 10 points proposed by Iran. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇴 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 伊朗驻巴基斯坦大使表示，伊朗代表团将于今晚抵达伊斯兰堡，基于伊朗提出的10点建议进行“严肃会谈”。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 WSJ: Ship traffic through the Strait of Hormuz remained extremely limited on Wednesday, despite President Donald Trump calling for its immediate reopening as part of the ceasefire conditions. The NJ Earth, sailing under a Greek flag, and the Daytona Beach, sailing under a Liberian flag, were the first to transit through the Strait of Hormuz. hipping uncertainty remains high, with reports that some operators have paid fees exceeding $1 million to secure passage, highlighting continued risks to global energy and trade flows. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇳 🇺🇸 《华尔街日报》：尽管总统唐纳德·特朗普作为停火条件的一部分呼吁立即重新开放，但周三通过霍尔木兹海峡的船只交通仍然极其有限。悬挂希腊国旗的“新泽西地球”号和悬挂利比里亚国旗的“代托纳海滩”号是首批通过霍尔木兹海峡的船只。航运不确定性依然很高，有报道称，一些运营商已支付超过100万美元的费用以确保通行，突显出全球能源和贸易流动持续面临风险。@wfwitness

text: Daily summary on the key news of the past 24 hours! — Israel unleashes ‘largest’ bombing wave in Lebanon since start of operation over a month ago. More than '100 targets/residential area' struck in just 10 minutes across central Beirut, southern suburbs, the south, and the Bekaa. — Natanyahu says the ceasefire does not include Lebanon. — White House does not acknowledge the 10-point proposal. — After Israel’s attack on Lebanon, all ship traffic through Strait of Hormuz STOPPED — Fars News. — Israel killed another Journalist in Gaza. — 254 killed, 1,165 injured in today’s Israeli strikes across Lebanon — preliminary Civil Defense toll. — UAE attacked Iran hours after the ceasefire. Iran retaliated by attacking Fujairah UAE.
text_zh: 过去24小时关键新闻每日摘要！——以色列发动自行动开始一个多月以来对黎巴嫩的'最大规模'轰炸波。仅10分钟内，贝鲁特中部、南部郊区、南部及贝卡地区超过'100个目标/居民区'遭袭。——内塔尼亚胡表示停火不包括黎巴嫩。——白宫未承认十点提案。——以色列袭击黎巴嫩后，所有通过霍尔木兹海峡的船舶交通已停止——法尔斯通讯社报道。——以色列在加沙又杀害一名记者。——今日以色列对黎巴嫩各地的袭击造成254人死亡，1165人受伤——民防初步统计。——阿联酋在停火数小时后袭击伊朗。伊朗通过攻击富查伊拉阿联酋进行报复。

text: ⚡️ IMF, World Bank, and WFP Warn: West Asia War Fuels Global Food Insecurity The three organizations issued a joint statement warning that the ongoing war in the West Asia has triggered one of the largest disruptions to global energy markets in modern history. Sharp rises in oil, natural gas, and fertilizer prices, along with transport bottlenecks, will inevitably drive up food prices and worsen food insecurity worldwide.
text_zh: ⚡️ IMF、世界银行和WFP警告：西亚战争加剧全球粮食不安全 这三家机构发表联合声明警告称，持续中的西亚战争已引发现代史上对全球能源市场最大规模的冲击之一。石油、天然气和化肥价格飙升，加之运输瓶颈，将不可避免地推高食品价格，加剧全球粮食不安全状况。

text: New nukes which Iran doesn't have and open the Hormoz which was open before the war. Great. Now F off please
text_zh: 伊朗没有的新核武器，以及重新开放战前本就开放的霍尔木兹。很好。现在请滚开

text: 🇺🇸 Trump, posting about US troops remaining around Iran, says the U.S. military is “looking forward” to its “next conquest.”
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普在发布关于美军继续驻留伊朗周边的言论时称，美国军队正“期待”其“下一次征服”。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 Massive crowds gathered across Iran demanding a firm response to the enemy’s ceasefire violation.
text_zh: 🇮🇸 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 伊朗各地大规模人群聚集，要求对敌人违反停火协议的行为作出坚决回应。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 The IRGC Navy released a map of the new shipping lane for the Strait of Hormuz due to the possiblitiy of anti-shipping mines placed during the conflict. The entry route is from the Sea of Oman northwards to Larak island and then towards the Persian Gulf. The exit route is following the entry in reverse order. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇸 伊斯兰革命卫队海军发布了霍尔木兹海峡新航道图，因冲突期间可能布设了反舰水雷。入口路线从阿曼海向北至拉拉克岛，然后进入波斯湾。出口路线按入口路线反向行驶。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇪 Bloomberg: The Trump administration is working with Venezuela’s interim government to potentially transfer Alex Saab, a prominent Maduro administration moneyman, to the United States to face prosecution in what would be a najor advance in cooperation between the two countries. Officials say Caracas is exploring legal avenues to revoke Saab’s Venezuelan citizenship, as the country’s constitution prohibits extraditing its own nationals. U.S. officials have already talked with Saab in Caracas, pressing him to reveal where former Venezuelan President Maduro's assets are. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇪 彭博社：特朗普政府正与委内瑞拉临时政府合作，可能将马杜罗政府的重要财务官亚历克斯·萨博引渡至美国受审，这将是两国合作的一大进展。官员称加拉加斯正在探索法律途径，以撤销萨博的委内瑞拉国籍，因该国宪法禁止引渡本国公民。美国官员已在加拉加斯与萨博会面，施压其透露前委内瑞拉总统马杜罗资产的下落。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 Trump gave Netanyahu the green light to continue pummeling Lebanon, and thus violate the terms of Trump's own ceasefire, almost immediately upon Trump announcing it. Barak Ravid about Trump to Netanyahu: “You can continue on doing what you’re doing in Lebanon.”
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 特朗普几乎在宣布停火的同时，就给了内塔尼亚胡继续打击黎巴嫩的绿灯，从而违反了他自己提出的停火条件。巴拉克·拉维德转述特朗普对内塔尼亚胡的话：‘你们可以继续在黎巴嫩的行动。’

text: 🇦🇪 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 UAE President MBZ's Advisor Anwar Gargash: The UAE triumphed in a war we sincerely sought to avoid, and we prevailed through an epic national defense that safeguarded sovereignty and dignity and protected our achievements in the face of treacherous aggression. Our strength, resilience, and steadfastness have reinforced the UAE's renaissance model.
text_zh: 🇦🇪 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 阿联酋总统穆罕默德·本·扎耶德的顾问安瓦尔·加尔加什：阿联酋在一场我们真诚希望避免的战争中取得了胜利，我们通过一场捍卫主权与尊严、保护我们成就免受背信弃义侵略的史诗级国防取得了胜利。我们的力量、韧性和坚定巩固了阿联酋的复兴模式。

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Susan Khalil (Al-Manar TV) and Ghada Al-Dayekh (Sawt Al-Farah radio) were martyred in yesterday’s Zionist attacks on Lebanon.
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 苏珊·哈利勒（Al-Manar电视台）和加达·阿尔-达耶赫（Sawt Al-Farah电台）在昨日犹太复国主义者对黎巴嫩的袭击中殉难。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 NYT: U.S. President Trump interjected during a meeting on Iranian ceasefire negotiations to list the number of bridges and power plants he was prepared to strike, telling aides that the Iranian government would be responsible if any of the U.S. strikes killed Iranians gathered around the structures. Prior to the announcement of the last minute ceasefire agreement, talks had privately been progressing with Supreme Leader of Iran Khamenei appearing to approve of negotiations moving forward on Monday. But on Tuesday morning the White House had grown impatient, leading to Trump posting his threat against Iran. This lead Iranian leaders, furious over Trump threatening to strike critical infrastructure, to pass a message along through Pakistan that communication with the U.S. would cease, believing that Iranian control over the Strait of Hormuz gave them the upper hand. It was China that was able to break the impass in negotiations by telling Iran to think of the economic impact on their allies, such as China, of keeping the Strait closed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 纽约时报：美国总统特朗普在伊朗停火谈判会议中插话，列举了他准备打击的桥梁和发电厂数量，并告诉助手，如果美军袭击导致聚集在这些建筑周围的伊朗人死亡，伊朗政府将承担责任。在最后一刻停火协议宣布前，谈判私下里取得进展，伊朗最高领袖哈梅内伊似乎于周一批准了继续谈判。但周二早晨，白宫失去耐心，导致特朗普发布了对伊朗的威胁。这激怒了伊朗领导人，他们对特朗普威胁打击关键基础设施感到愤怒，通过巴基斯坦传递信息，表示将停止与美国的沟通，认为伊朗对霍尔木兹海峡的控制让他们占据上风。是中国打破了谈判僵局，告诉伊朗要考虑封锁海峡对其盟友（如中国）的经济影响。@wfwitness

text: The day when even President Reagan stood against Israel over Israeli bombing in Beirut and told them: You are doing another holocaust https://www.reaganfoundation.org/ronald-reagan/white-house-diaries/diary-entry-08121982
text_zh: 即使里根总统也曾因以色列轰炸贝鲁特而反对以色列，并告诉他们：你们正在制造另一场大屠杀 https://www.reaganfoundation.org/ronald-reagan/white-house-diaries/diary-entry-08121982

text: ❗️ Trump then proceeded to tell Israel to violate what Trump's own administration mentioned and approved Trump reportedly gave Netanyahu the "green light" to continue pummeling Lebanon, and thus violate the terms of Trump's own "ceasefire," almost immediately upon Trump announcing it. Really makes you wonder about the whole premise of this supposed "ceasefire" 🗣 Barak Ravid about Trump to Netanyahu: “You can continue on doing what you’re doing in Lebanon.”
text_zh: ❗️ 特朗普随后告诉以色列，违反其政府提及并批准的条款据报道，特朗普几乎在宣布自己的“停火”后立即，就给了内塔尼亚胡“绿灯”，允许其继续打击黎巴嫩，从而违反特朗普自己的“停火”条款。这确实让人怀疑这场所谓“停火”的整个前提 🗣 巴拉克·拉维德转述特朗普对内塔尼亚胡的话：“你们可以继续在黎巴嫩的行动。”

text: 🇺🇸 White House ballroom plan criticized over foreign steel Plans by Donald Trump to build a new ballroom at the White House are facing backlash (again) after reports that part of the steel would come from abroad. The project—estimated at about $400 million and backed by private donations—reportedly includes materials supplied by ArcelorMittal and produced in Europe. The issue has drawn attention because it appears to clash with Trump’s “America First” agenda, which emphasized tariffs on imported steel to protect U.S. industry. Critics say the use of foreign steel in a flagship presidential project undercuts that policy message, turning the ballroom into a broader symbol of inconsistency in trade priorities. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 白宫宴会厅计划因使用外国钢材受批评特朗普在白宫建造新宴会厅的计划因部分钢材来自国外而面临反弹（再次）。该项目估计耗资约4亿美元，由私人捐款支持，据报道包括安赛乐米塔尔供应并在欧洲生产的材料。此事引发关注，因为它似乎与特朗普的“美国优先”议程相冲突，该议程强调对进口钢材加征关税以保护美国工业。批评者称，在总统旗舰项目中使用外国钢材削弱了政策信息，使宴会厅成为贸易优先事项不一致的象征。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ❗️ The U.S. had seen Pakistan PM Sharif’s statement before he tweeted it, and may even have written it themselves... .. and that statement mentioned Le banon in the ceasefire. It’s obvious Lebanon was included, Israel saw an opportunity to trap Iran by pursuing the war in Lebanon, and Trump subsequently claimed, falsely, that Lebanon wasn’t included By NYT
text_zh: ❗️ 美国在巴基斯坦总理谢里夫发推前就已看到他的声明，甚至可能是他们自己撰写的……该声明在停火协议中提到了黎巴嫩。显然黎巴嫩被包含在内，以色列看到了通过在黎巴嫩继续战争来牵制伊朗的机会，而特朗普随后错误地声称黎巴嫩未被包含在内。据纽约时报报道

text: 🐻 If you are confused about what's actually been happening in the world - we got you! Here's the key news of the past 24 hours: ➡️ Of course, the ceasefire between Iran and the Epstein Coalition didn't last - Israel attacked Lebanon, Pakistani PM confirms that the ceasefire was violated, and here's what we think actually happened. ➡️ Iran was attacked as well ➡️ The Belgian Foreign Minister who came to Lebanon to negotiate a ceasefire in the region says that Israel almost killed him , and Italy has summoned the Israeli ambassador after IDF forces fired on an Italian UNIFIL convoy in southern Lebanon. ➡️ Dmitry Medvedev gives a summary of the situation around Iran ➡️ Trump says that any country that supplies Iran with weapons will be hit with 50% tariffs , and is upset with NATO ➡️ Iranian FM Araghchi says that the U.S. must choose — ceasefire or continued war via Israel. ➡️ Leavitt says the 10-point plan reported by media is not the one Trump agreed to use as a basis for negotiations , and Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesperson Esmaeil Baghaei accused the United States of backtracking on the terms of a reported Iran–US ceasefire understanding. ➡️ Russians are testing some sort of automated anti-drone machine gun turret, watch it do its thing ➡️ An investigative exposé on the "Christian Genocide" narrative and the weaponization of terrorism in Nigeria's Middle Belt. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🐻 如果你对世界上正在发生的事情感到困惑——我们为你梳理！以下是过去24小时的关键新闻：➡️ 当然，伊朗和爱泼斯坦联盟之间的停火并未持续——以色列袭击了黎巴嫩，巴基斯坦总理证实停火遭破坏，以下是我们认为实际发生的情况。➡️ 伊朗也遭到攻击 ➡️ 前来黎巴嫩谈判地区停火的比利时外交部长表示，以色列差点杀了他，而在以色列国防军向黎巴嫩南部的意大利联黎部队车队开火后，意大利已召见以色列大使。➡️ 德米特里·梅德韦杰夫对伊朗周边局势进行总结 ➡️ 特朗普表示，任何向伊朗提供武器的国家将面临50%的关税，并对北约感到不满 ➡️ 伊朗外长阿拉格希称，美国必须选择——停火或通过以色列继续战争。➡️ 莱维特表示媒体报道的10点计划并非特朗普同意作为谈判基础的那份，伊朗外交部发言人埃斯梅尔·巴盖伊指责美国在据称的伊美停火谅解条款上出尔反尔。➡️ 俄罗斯人正在测试某种自动反无人机机枪塔，观看它的表现 ➡️ 关于尼日利亚中带地区“基督教种族灭绝”叙事及恐怖主义武器化的调查报道。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 NATO Secretary General Rutte says that U.S. President Trump is clearly upset by the lack of NATO support during the conflict with Iran, but that he explained to Trump the ways that NATO members gave support. "Well, let me be absolutely clear. He is clearly disappointed with many NATO allies, and I can see his point. But at the same time, I was also able to point to the fact that the large majority of European nations has been helpful with basing, with logistics, with overflights, with making sure that they live up to the commitments. And there is also widespread support for the fact that degrading the nuclear and the ballistic missile capacity from Iran was really crucial and that only the U.S. was able to do that at this point." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 北约秘书长吕特表示，美国总统特朗普显然对与伊朗冲突期间缺乏北约支持感到不满，但他向特朗普解释了北约成员国提供支持的方式。“好吧，让我说得非常清楚。他对许多北约盟友显然感到失望，我能理解他的观点。但同时，我也能指出，大多数欧洲国家在基地使用、后勤、飞越领空以及确保履行承诺方面提供了帮助。而且广泛支持削弱伊朗核与弹道导弹能力至关重要，目前只有美国能做到这一点。” @wfwitness

text: Tucker Carlson: "The United States has to detach from Israel." "This distancing should begin with a total end of aid of any kind—military or economic—to Israel."
text_zh: 塔克·卡尔森：“美国必须与以色列脱钩。”“这种疏远应从全面停止对以色列的任何援助——军事或经济——开始。”

text: Tucker Carlson: "Why can't this president, or any president, say no to Israel?" "Why does this tiny country have so much control over our government?"
text_zh: 塔克·卡尔森：“为什么这位总统，或任何总统，都不能对以色列说不？”“为什么这个小国对我们的政府有如此大的控制力？”

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 AP: 50 newly created Polymarket wallets placed large “Yes” bets on a ceasefire on April 7, despite escalating rhetoric from U.S. President Trump earlier in the day suggesting no imminent agreement. Some accounts made significant profits within hours. One wallet reportedly turned a $72,000 position into around $200,000, while others recorded gains exceeding $100,000. The episode has renewed calls in Washington to regulate prediction markets more tightly, amid concerns they could be exploited by insiders with advance knowledge of geopolitical or military developments. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美联社：尽管美国总统特朗普当天早些时候的升级言论暗示不会立即达成协议，但50个新创建的Polymarket钱包在4月7日对停火投下了大量“是”的赌注。一些账户在数小时内获得了可观利润。据报道，一个钱包将7.2万美元的头寸变成了约20万美元，而其他账户的收益超过10万美元。这一事件在华盛顿再次引发呼吁，要求更严格监管预测市场，担心它们可能被掌握地缘政治或军事进展内幕消息的人利用。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: The White House is considering a plan to punish certain NATO allies that U.S. President Trump believes did not support the United States and Israel during the Iran war. The proposal includes potentially relocating U.S. troops away from countries deemed unhelpful, such as Spain, Germany, Italy, and France, and redeploying them to more supportive nations, particularly in Eastern Europe. The plan remains in early stages but has gained traction among senior officials. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 华尔街日报：白宫正考虑一项计划，惩罚那些美国总统特朗普认为在伊朗战争期间未支持美国和以色列的北约盟友。该提案包括可能将美军从被视为不合作的国家（如西班牙、德国、意大利和法国）撤离，并重新部署到更支持的国家，尤其是东欧国家。该计划仍处于早期阶段，但已获得高级官员的支持。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 Kan: Israeli officials assess that Iran is considering launching attacks against Israel in response to continued Israeli strikes in Lebanon after the Israeli leadership insisted to the U.S. that Lebanon not be included in the ceasefire agreement. Despite the current truce, Israeli officials believe the ceasefire could become permanent and lead to a broader agreement with Iran, though concerns remain over Tehran’s ballistic missile programme and enriched uranium stockpiles. Sources in Israel expressed frustration over the situation, suggesting the current arrangement may only delay future conflict, while acknowledging the decisive role of the United States in shaping outcomes. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 坎：以色列官员评估，伊朗正考虑对以色列发动袭击，以回应以色列在黎巴嫩的持续打击，此前以色列领导层向美国坚持要求黎巴嫩不被纳入停火协议。尽管目前停火，以色列官员认为该停火可能永久化，并促成与伊朗的更广泛协议，但对德黑兰的弹道导弹计划和高浓铀库存仍存担忧。以色列消息人士对局势表示沮丧，暗示当前安排可能仅推迟未来冲突，同时承认美国在塑造结果中的决定性作用。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇹🇭🇮🇷Khaosod: The Thai flagged vessel Mayuree Naree has run aground on the Iranian island of Qeshm. Previously the vessel was struck by an unidentified munition with the fate of three crew members still unknown. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇹🇭 🇮🇷 Thai Foreign Minister Sihasak Phuangketkeow announced that the three missing Thai crew members of the Mayuree Naree have been confirmed dead. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复战争前线见证者："⚡️🇹🇭🇮🇷考索德：泰国国旗船只Mayuree Naree已在伊朗格什姆岛搁浅。此前该船遭不明弹药击中，三名船员的命运仍未知。@wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇹🇭 🇮🇷 泰国外交部长西哈萨·蓬吉特克奥宣布，Mayuree Naree号上三名失踪的泰国船员已确认死亡。@wfwitness
